message: Soil long-read metagenomic DNA is not a published exact workflow in this repository. The environmental long-read examples documented here are centered on air and passive-water sampling rather than soil matrices.
why_not_exact: The collection does not currently include a soil-specific extraction, preprocessing, assembly, binning, and annotation workflow with validated thresholds for this sample class.

message: This environmental sample type falls outside the exact air, wetland, and water-eDNA examples currently published in the repository.
why_not_exact: The public environmental workflows here are example backends for air, passive-water wetland, and water-eDNA use cases rather than a generic environmental meta-pipeline for all matrices.

message: Clinical metagenomic use cases in this repository are currently represented by the AMR host-association workflow rather than by generic isolate-style AMR profiling, assembly, or plasmid-clustering routes.
why_not_exact: The documented clinical metagenome route here focuses on methylation-aware AMR host linkage, not a general-purpose clinical metagenome workflow for every isolate-derived goal.

message: The published food-safety route in this repository is the Listeria adaptive-sampling comparison workflow. More general food-safety use cases are not yet represented by a dedicated public pipeline here.
why_not_exact: The current collection provides a Listeria-focused target-recovery and adaptive-sampling example backend rather than a broader food-safety workflow family.
